codeReview.summary: The fix closes both prior blocking gaps. The updated Playwright spec now drives tab A through the full UI rotate-keyset flow (form/review/progress/profile/distribute/complete), has tabs B/C adopt rotated packages via bfonboard decode, reasserts group_pk preservation and rotated-material distinctness, and adds a direct old-share rejection gate by asserting sign failure drain (and no sign completion) for a pre-rotation share.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The feature again used `protocol-flow-worker`, but that skill is scoped to source-side onboarding sponsorship and mandates agent-browser ceremony validation. This rotate-keyset regression fix is Playwright-focused and does not follow that procedure, suggesting skill assignment/procedure docs are still mismatched for this class of feature.

summary: Pass. Compared against the original failing feature diff and prior fail review, this fix now exercises the required UI-driven rotate pipeline and directly verifies old-share rejection via runtime failure drain, while preserving rotated-share sign-success coverage.
